title: Copa Cobblemon 2.5
description: Official modpack for Copa Cobblemon, 2.5 edition.
body:
Basically, this is the **Copa Cobblemon** 2.5 modpack — an edition of the cup specially focused on battles between trainers.

This version is quite similar to the **Copa Cobblemon** 2 edition, but this time it includes more mods, aiming for better player performance.

_Made by Pimenta Parado_
